6693df33696c27ccc872c334955bcff0:
SELECT location AS city, SUM(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS total_sales 
FROM ecommerce_behavior 
GROUP BY location 
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;
5177d09d204d86d7f571a0862123ac20: SELECT purchase_category AS category, AVG(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS avg_purchase_amount, COUNT(*) AS num_purchases FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY purchase_category ORDER BY avg_purchase_amount DESC;
59a7144da94881ba41e7c7b6439b1cc7: SELECT device_used_for_shopping AS device, COUNT(*) AS purchase_count FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY device_used_for_shopping ORDER BY purchase_count DESC
336dda19005ca52f39d6b4a86c8dce6d: SELECT payment_method, COUNT(customer_id) AS count FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY payment_method ORDER BY count DESC;
8cd6995bcb18881c35bd3240185319a4:
SELECT 'income_level' AS factor, income_level AS value, AVG(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS avg_purchase FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY income_level
UNION ALL
SELECT 'gender' AS factor, gender AS value, AVG(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS avg_purchase FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY gender
UNION ALL
SELECT 'marital_status' AS factor, marital_status AS value, AVG(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS avg_purchase FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY marital_status
UNION ALL
SELECT 'education_level' AS factor, education_level AS value, AVG(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS avg_purchase FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY education_level
UNION ALL
SELECT 'occupation' AS factor, occupation AS value, AVG(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS avg_purchase FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY occupation
UNION ALL
SELECT 'location' AS factor, location AS value, AVG(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS avg_purchase FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY location
UNION ALL
SELECT 'purchase_category' AS factor, purchase_category AS value, AVG(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS avg_purchase FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY purchase_category
UNION ALL
SELECT 'frequency_of_purchase' AS factor, frequency_of_purchase AS value, AVG(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS avg_purchase FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY frequency_of_purchase
UNION ALL
SELECT 'purchase_channel' AS factor, purchase_channel AS value, AVG(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS avg_purchase FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY purchase_channel
UNION ALL
SELECT 'brand_loyalty' AS factor, brand_loyalty AS value, AVG(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS avg_purchase FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY brand_loyalty
UNION ALL
SELECT 'social_media_influence' AS factor, social_media_influence AS value, AVG(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS avg_purchase FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY social_media_influence
UNION ALL
SELECT 'discount_sensitivity' AS factor, discount_sensitivity AS value, AVG(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS avg_purchase FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY discount_sensitivity
UNION ALL
SELECT 'engagement_with_ads' AS factor, engagement_with_ads AS value, AVG(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS avg_purchase FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY engagement_with_ads
UNION ALL
SELECT 'purchase_intent' AS factor, purchase_intent AS value, AVG(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS avg_purchase FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY purchase_intent
UNION ALL
SELECT 'discount_used' AS factor, discount_used AS value, AVG(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS avg_purchase FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY discount_used
UNION ALL
SELECT 'customer_loyalty_program_member' AS factor, customer_loyalty_program_member AS value, AVG(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS avg_purchase FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY customer_loyalty_program_member
UNION ALL
SELECT 'device_used_for_shopping' AS factor, device_used_for_shopping AS value, AVG(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS avg_purchase FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY device_used_for_shopping
UNION ALL
SELECT 'payment_method' AS factor, payment_method AS value, AVG(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS avg_purchase FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY payment_method
UNION ALL

ORDER BY avg_purchase DESC
f9c9c63bafaf39d7ec116c27c4a05c4d:
SELECT 'education_level' AS factor, education_level AS value, AVG(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS avg_purchase_amount 
FROM ecommerce_behavior 
GROUP BY education_level 
ORDER BY avg_purchase_amount DESC
a8c8e38756a9772ad6888ff1b55b6e30:
SELECT 
    LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(Purchase_Category, ''))) AS Purchase_Category,
    SUM(Purchase_Amount::NUMERIC) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    ecommerce_behavior
GROUP BY 
    LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(Purchase_Category, '')))
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC
LIMIT 100;

a791a7bc2e3445f51736e0f07f5165bf.sql: SELECT purchase_category, AVG(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS average_sales FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY purchase_category ORDER BY average_sales DESC LIMIT 5

32e6873d2359b97a11550a6b66883c4e.sql:
SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(discount_used, ''))) = 'yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / 
    NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) 
FROM ecommerce_behavior;

dafc53d77a0c6aa3aa9e3f98dbd55dbf.sql:
SELECT customer_id, SUM(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS revenue 
FROM ecommerce_behavior 
GROUP BY customer_id 
ORDER BY revenue DESC 
LIMIT 3
